message:
Add skill validation using agentskills skills-ref

Introduce a new validate-skills CI job that validates all skills
across plugins using the official skills-ref tool from agentskills.
The job runs in parallel with the existing plugin structure validation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,3 +19,33 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Run validation
         run: ./scripts/validate-plugins.sh
+
+  validate-skills:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+
+      - name: Install skills-ref
+        run: uv tool install git+https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills.git#subdirectory=skills-ref
+
+      - name: Validate skills
+        run: |
+          errors=0
+          for skill_dir in plugins/*/skills/*/; do
+            if [ -d "$skill_dir" ]; then
+              echo "Validating $skill_dir..."
+              if ! skills-ref validate "$skill_dir"; then
+                errors=$((errors + 1))
+              fi
+            fi
+          done
+          if [ $errors -gt 0 ]; then
+            echo "::error::$errors skill(s) failed validation"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          echo "All skills validated successfully"

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Skill validation in CI using agentskills skills-ref
+type: feature
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2025-12-18T17:40:36.76498Z
+---
+
+The CI now validates all plugin skills using the official `skills-ref` tool from the [agentskills](https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills) project. This validation runs in parallel with the existing plugin structure validation, ensuring skills conform to the Agent Skills specification.
